BlueMushroom.BigCraftable.Description: A bit of blue in the garden means a bit of magic is afoot.
BrownCappedMushroom.BigCraftable.Descrip: A common mushroom to find in the woods or after a long rain.
CurledStem.BigCraftable.Description: A curious shape, perhaps it is useful for things that involve time?
FuzzyPlant.BigCraftable.Description: A sort of fuzzy blue-green moss drapes itself across this plant.
GiantPurpleMushroom.BigCraftable.Descrip: An unusual color, these make for an interesting find in caves.
GlowingStem.BigCraftable.Description: Remarkable for its flowers that are said to glow under a Blue Moon.
GoldenFlamePlant.BigCraftable.Descriptio: The golden tendrils evoke a feeling of whimsy and daring.
GreenFern.BigCraftable.Description: Found along overgrown forest paths, locals believe they pave the way to the Deep Woods where only the occult dwell.
PinkCrystalPlant.BigCraftable.Descriptio: A rare find in meadows, this plant springs up after lightning strikes a certain type of ground material.
PurpleBlownUmbrellaPlant.BigCraftable.De: Springing up in heavy rain, this plant gathers water in its flowers to attract unsuspecting pollinators.
PurpleCrystalPlant.BigCraftable.Descript: Found in caves, this plant originally was thought to be a rock!
PurpleWizardHatPlant.BigCraftable.Descri: Although plants can't run, this one always seems to have the appearance of a fleeing man.
RedCappedMushroom.BigCraftable.Descripti: They seem to spring up from nowhere. Watch your feet!
RedFern.BigCraftable.Description: A rare sight. A local legend holds that this fern only grows at the site of a deep, tragic love.
RedLeavedVine.BigCraftable.Description: This plant's deep red leaves invite a sense of dark anticipation, but it's actually a favorite for floral arrangements.
RedSpottedMushroom.BigCraftable.Descript: Thought to be a common ingredient in witch's brews, this mushroom is very toxic.
SmallBrownMushroom.BigCraftable.Descript: Found after a torrent of rain, this mushroom in commonly found in the fall.
SmallPurpleMushrooms.BigCraftable.Descri: Fairies may use these as a place to gather and gossip.
SmallRedCappedMushroom.BigCraftable.Desc: Locals believe these mushrooms to sometimes be small angry men in disguise.
SnowdropPlant.BigCraftable.Description: Plucked from the first snow of the season, this delightful plant is thought to bring good luck to those who find it!
VioletMushroom.BigCraftable.Description: Found in swmaps, this toxic mushroom is best kept away from any kitchen.
WarpPlant.BigCraftable.Description: Locals believe the mystical use this plant as a gateway between worlds.
WhiteStarVine1.BigCraftable.Description: Reputed to be at the pinnacle of its beauty when the light of a waning moon touches its petals.
WhiteStarVine2.BigCraftable.Description: A flower thought to come from the stars.
